classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机外形与轴端结构尺寸图，包含轴径、轴长、键槽、总长、形位公差和基准标注，如'KEY'、'36'、'55±1'、'170±1.5'、'0.08 A'等；还标出航插凸点相对前出轴的位置，属于机械安装与外形尺寸信息。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内是动力线表格，列出'引线号'与'信号定义'、'引线颜色'、'线径Wire'的对应关系，包括 B-U、I-V、F-W、G-PE、C-BK+、E-BK− 以及颜色和 16AWG，属于动力接口接线与针脚定义。全图中该区域对应左上蓝框动力线部分，反馈线等其他区域不属于本目标框。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内仅显示表头文字'连接器型号'和'Connector Models'，在完整图中对应连接器型号栏标题；该区域未给出针脚功能、线色或接线定义，因此最接近机械尺寸类中关于连接器型号或外形位置相关信息的范围。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是标注为'反馈线'和'Feedback'的接线表，列出A到T等针脚及其信号定义和线色，如'SD+'、'SD-'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'+5V'、'GND'、'SHIELD'以及'蓝 BLUE'、'黄 YELLOW'等，体现反馈接口针脚与信号/线色对应关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是反馈连接器的正面结构示意及型号文字'CMS3102A20-29PE009-A'，仅展示连接器外形、孔位图和型号，未在目标区域内给出针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此最接近机械结构/外形类信息。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: The supplied part-number text is not visibly present in the image; the provided initial region falls on blank space below the drawing, so this bbox is retained only as the initial hint and should be treated as unresolved.

drawing_metadata.drawing_context: Feedback connector front-face model detail cropped from product outline drawing
drawing_metadata.assumed_units: Not applicable for connector model text

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not infer hidden or illegible characters.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Millimeters may be assumed only for mechanical dimensions; this crop contains no direct dimensional values.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use professional mechanical/electrical connector terminology while preserving model strings unchanged.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 反馈线连接器型号为 CMS3102A20-29PE009-A。
dimension_records.engineering_notes: Connector face detail shows circular multi-pin insert with square mounting flange; model text is the only readable authoritative callout in this crop.
dimension_records.ambiguity_notes: Internal pin/contact markings are visible but too small and overlapping for reliable complete transcription.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 反馈线连接器型号为 CMS3102A20-29PE009-A。

mounting_interface.zh: 图中可见方形法兰和四角安装孔，但该裁剪区域没有可读安装尺寸。
mounting_interface.en: A square flange with four corner mounting holes is visible, but no readable mounting dimensions are present in this crop.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该区域为反馈连接器细节，不包含轴或键槽接口信息。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: This region is a feedback connector detail and contains no shaft or keyway interface data.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 未标注外形尺寸或间隙尺寸；不得由图形比例推断。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No overall envelope or clearance dimensions are labeled; values must not be inferred from image proportions.

connector_considerations.zh: 可确认反馈线连接器型号为 CMS3102A20-29PE009-A；内部针位标识因尺寸过小未可靠提取。
connector_considerations.en: The feedback connector model is identified as CMS3102A20-29PE009-A; internal pin markings are too small for reliable extraction.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少连接器安装尺寸、针位表、配套插头信息、防护等级和电缆出线方向等直接标注。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Direct callouts for connector mounting dimensions, pinout, mating plug, protection rating, and cable exit direction are not present in IMAGE 1.

unresolved_items.issue: Tiny internal pin/contact labels inside the connector face are visible but not reliably legible as complete engineering callouts in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: Pin assignment or insert numbering cannot be authoritatively extracted from this crop.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Use a higher-resolution connector detail or the wiring table from the full drawing if pinout data is required.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪和完整标注源图中对应区域为标题为'未注线性公差'和'Undeclared linear tolerance'的公差表，列出尺寸范围'0.5~3'、'>3~6'等与对应'±0.2'至'±1.2'线性公差，属于机械图纸尺寸与公差信息。

text_annotations.correction_note: Selected complete overlapping title OCR and removed duplicate fragments ocr_001 and ocr_002.
Normalized Chinese comma to English comma; removed duplicate fragments ocr_004 and ocr_006.
Reordered vertical combined OCR '(N.m)Torque' into axis label order; removed duplicate fragments ocr_007 and ocr_011.
OCR merged three vertical axis tick labels into one string.
Inserted spaces in merged OCR; removed duplicate fragments ocr_012 and ocr_013.
Normalized Chinese comma to English comma.
Normalized Chinese comma to English comma; removed duplicate fragments ocr_017 and ocr_018.
Selected tighter high-confidence tick label OCR and removed duplicate ocr_020.
Inserted space in merged OCR; removed duplicate fragments ocr_022 and ocr_024.
Normalized Chinese comma to English comma.
Selected broader x/y origin tick OCR and removed duplicate ocr_026.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Chart units are N.m for torque; rpm axis label is visually present but no OCR source_id was provided in the supplied list.

terminology_notes: Workspace labels are operating-region labels, not mechanical dimensions.
Coordinate callouts are interpreted as speed-torque pairs in the performance curve.
translation_notes: short term workspace translated as 短时工作区.
Continuous workspace translated as 连续工作区.

dimension_records.reason: Title identifies this region as a motor performance curve rather than a mechanical dimension view.
Vertical axis label indicates torque and its unit for the curve.
OCR includes visible y-axis tick labels; one source merges 25, 20, and 15.
These are horizontal-axis tick labels detected by OCR; some visually present ticks lack provided source_ids.
Text labels the upper operating region of the performance curve.
Text labels the lower continuous operating region of the performance curve.
Coordinate callout on the upper curve indicates speed and torque point.
Coordinate callout near the continuous curve indicates speed and torque point.
Coordinate callout at the right side of the upper boundary indicates speed and torque endpoint.
Coordinate callout at the right side of the lower boundary indicates speed and torque endpoint.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Not specified in this cropped performance-curve region.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: The RPM axis label and some x-axis tick values appear visually present, but only supplied OCR source_ids were used.

unresolved_items.issue: The visible RPM axis label has no corresponding supplied OCR source_id in the provided ocr_source_boxes segment, so it was not added as a text_annotation.
Visible x-axis tick labels 1500 and 2000 lack corresponding supplied OCR source_ids in the provided ocr_source_boxes segment, so they were not added as text_annotations.
ocr_009 text 'V' appears to be a false OCR detection from the triangular marker and was excluded as non-text noise.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 裁剪区显示的是编码器性能参数表，含'绝对值式多圈光编'和'8388608 (M16/S23bit)'等编码器规格信息，属于反馈编码器相关内容；虽然不是针脚定义表，但在现有类别中最接近反馈接口类。
